case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JAZMIN FLOR AQUIJE LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JAZMIN FLOR AQUIJE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-05-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JAZMIN FLOR AQUIJE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JAZMIN FLOR AQUIJE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JAZMIN FLOR AQUIJE LOPEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JAZMIN FLOR AQUIJE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $431.38 AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JAZMIN FLOR AQUIJE
